name: Coke-a-Cola Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the cocoa powder, vanilla, and salt to the mixture. Stir well.
3. Add Coca-Cola to the mixture. Mix thoroughly.
4. Add baking soda to the mixture. Beat in eggs one at a time.
5. Fold in marshmallows until evenly distributed.
6. Pour batter into greased and floured 9-inch round cake pan, filling halfway.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven and let cool in pan for 10 minutes.
9. In another bowl, beat margarine with sugar until creamy.
10. Gradually add Coca-Cola and cocoa powder to the mixture. Mix well.
11. Stir in vanilla extract.
12. Add powdered sugar gradually while mixing until desired frosting consistency is reached.
13. Pour frosting over cooled cake and spread evenly.
14. Sprinkle chopped nuts on top, if desired.
Enjoy your homemade Coke-a-cola Cake!
